evidence.title: How To Watch The Google I/O 2026 Keynote
evidence.snippet: # How to watch the Google I/O 2026 keynote. The keynote will include a boatload of AI news and perhaps some Android XR updates. We'll hear about a ton of updates for the company's consumer products at Google I/O 2026 as well. You'll be able to watch that on YouTube in English (a separate ASL stream is available). evidence.snippet: For 2026, Google has confirmed that I/O will run across two days, May 19 and May 20. The main keynote kicks off on Tuesday, May 19, at 1 p.m. ET

evidence.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026 - Google Blog
evidence.snippet: **8.**[Gemini Omni](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni/) is our new model that can create anything from any input — starting with video. [Gemini Omni in the Gemini app](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/next-evolution-gemini-app/) offers a fluid, conversational way to create and edit videos — like applying cinematic zooms or

evidence.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
Everything Announced at Google I/O 2026 - WIRED
evidence.snippet: Google is sprucing up its Gemini models, revamping search, and enabling AI agents in everything. The company showed off a swath of new agentic AI features and some demos of its upcoming Android-powered smart glasses. Google’s goal for 2026 is to put AI agents at the forefront of all its biggest services: Search, Gmail, YouTube, Docs, and the Chrome browser. In a demo briefing the day before I/O, G
